heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: Preliminary Homage
content: Namo tassa bhagavato arahato sammāsambuddhassa!!!

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 01. Ārādhanā (Invitation)
content:
Yāvatā bhagavā loke - tiṭṭheyya tava sāsanaṃ;

tāvatā patigaṇhātu - pūjā lokānukampayā.

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 02. Padīpa pūjā (Offering Oil Lamp)
content:
Gandhatelappadittena - dīpena tama dhaṃsinā;

tilokadīpaṃ sambuddhaṃ - pūjayāmī tamonudaṃ.

Sittha telappa dittena - dīpena tama dhaṃsinā;

tileāka dīpaṃ sambuddhaṃ - pūjayāmī tamonudaṃ.

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 03. Gandha pūjā (Offering Fragrance)
content:
sugandhikāya vadanaṃ - ananta guṇagandhinaṃ;

sugandhināhaṃ gandhena - pūjayāmī tathāgataṃ.

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 04. Gandhodaka pūjā (Offering Drinking water)
content:
sugandhaṃ sītalaṃ kappaṃ - pasanna madhuraṃ subhaṃ;

pānīya metaṃ bhagavā - patigaṇhātu muttama.

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 05. Uṇhodaka pūjā (Warm Water)
content:
adhivāsetu neā bhante - uṇhodakaṃ parikappitaṃ;

anukampaṃ upādāya - patigaṇhātu muttama.

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 06. Pānaka pūjā (Offering Allowable Drinks)
content:
adhivāsetu no bhante- gilānapaccayaṃ imaṃ;

anukampaṃ upādāya - patigaṇhātu muttama.

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 07. Phuppa pūjā (Offering Flower)
content:
nirodha samāpattito vuṭṭhahitvā viya

nisinnaṃ bhagavantaṃ arahantaṃ sammāsambuddhaṃ

iminā pupphena pūjemi pūjemi pūjemi.

ayaṃ puppha pūjā buddha pacceka buddha

aggasāvaka mahāsāvaka arahantādīnaṃ sabhāvasīlaṃ

ahampi tesaṃ anuvattako homi.

Idaṃ pupphaṃ idāni vaṇṇenapi suvaṇṇaṃ

gandhenapi sugandhaṃ

saṇṭhāṇenapi susaṇṭhānaṃ

khippameva dubbaṇṇaṃ duggandhaṃ dussaṇṭhānaṃ aniccataṃ pāpuṇissati

evameva kho sabbe saṃkhārā aniccā

sabbe saṃkhārā dukkhā

sabbe dhammā anattāti.

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 08. Homage to the Buddha
content:
amhākaṃ bhagavato evaṃ kalyāṇo kittisaddo abbhuggato

yo pi so bhagavā asītyānubyañjana patimaṇḍita

dvattiṃsākāra mahā purisa lakkhaṇa vicitta rūpakāyo

sabbākāra parisuddha sīlakkhandhādi guṇaratana samiddhidhammakāyo

yasamahanta, puññamahanta

thāmamahanta, iddhimahanta

paññāmahantānaṃ pāragato

asamo, asamasamo

appaṭimo, appaṭisamo

appaṭibhāgo, appaṭipuggalo arahaṃ sammāsambuddho

vijjācaraṇasampanno sugato lokavidū

anuttaro purisadammasārathi

satthā devamanussānaṃ buddho bhagavā’ti.

Imehi guṇehi samannāgataṃ arahantaṃ sammāsambuddhaṃ

nibbānatthāya sirasā namāmi.

jīvitaṃ yāva nibbānaṃ buddhaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi.

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 09. Homage to the Dhamma
content:
svakkhāto bhagavatā dhammo

sandiṭṭhiko akāliko

ehipassiko opaneyyiko

paccattaṃ veditabbo viññūhī’ti.

imehi guṇehi samannāgataṃ

sakala lokavimohaka mohadhaṃsakaṃ

pavaranīyāṇikaṃ saddhammaṃ

nibbānatthāya sirasā namāmi.

jīvitaṃ yāva nibbānaṃ dhammaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi.

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 10. Homage to the Saṅgha
content:
suppaṭipanno bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho

ujupaṭipanno bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho

ñāyapaṭipanno bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho

sāmīcipaṭipanno bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho

yadidaṃ cattāri purisayugāni aṭṭha purisapuggalā

esa bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho

āhuneyyo pāhuneyyo

dakkhiṇeyyo añjalikaraṇīyo

anuttaraṃ puññakkhettaṃ lokassā’ti.

Imehi guṇehi samannāgataṃ

anaghuttama dakkhiṇeyyaṃ pavara saṅgharatanaṃ

nibbānatthāya sirasā namāmi.

jīvitaṃ yāva nibbānaṃ saṃghaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi.

Monday: Tesattati ñāṇavandanā

Wednesday: Sattasattati ñāṇāvandanā

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 11. Catu Saṅvejanīyaṭhāna
content:
māyā suto sugata sākiya sīhanātho –

jātakkhaṇe sapadasāvabhisaṃkamitvā;

yasmiṃ udīrayi giraṃ varalumbiṇimhi –

taṃ jāta cetiyamahaṃ sirasā namāmi.

Yasmiṃ nisajja vajirāsana bandhanena – jetvā savāsana kilesa balaṃ munindo;

sambodhi ñāṇamavagamma vihāsi sammā –

taṃ bodhi cetiyamahaṃ sirasā namāmi.

Saṅkampayaṃ dasasahassiya loka dhātuṃ - desesi yatra bhagavā vara dhamma cakkaṃ;

barāṇasīpura samīpa vane migānaṃ - taṃ dhamma cetiyamahaṃ sirasā namāmi.

Katvāna loka hitamatta hitañca nātho – āsītikova upavattana kānanamhi;

yasmiṃ nipajja gatavā nirupādhisesaṃ - nibbāna cetiyamahaṃ sirasā namāmi.

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 12. Cetiya Vandanā (Veneration of pagodas, etc.)
content: vandāmi cetiyaṃ sabbaṃ - sabbaṭhānesu patiṭṭhitaṃ sārīrika dhātu mahā bodhiṃ - buddharūpaṃ sakalaṃ sadā.

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 13. Paritta Chanting
content:
• i. Metta Sutta.
  • ii. Mora Paritta – Last half.
  • iii. Khandha Paritta - verses.
  • iv. Āṭānāṭiyaparitta

vipassissa namatthu - cakkhumantassa sirīmato sikhissapi namatthu - sabba bhūtānukampino

vessabhussa namatthu - nahātakassa tapassino

namatthu kakusandhassa - mārasenā pamaddino

koṇāgamanassa namatthu - brāhmaṇassa vusīmato kassapassa namatthu - vippamuttassa sabbadhi aṃgīrasassa namatthu - sakyaputtassa sirīmato

namo tesaṃ sattannaṃ - sammāsambuddhānanti.

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 14. Sugatovāda (the Buddha’s daily admonishment)
content:
appamādena bhikkhave sampādetha,

dullabho buddhuppādo lokasmiṃ,

dullabho manussatta paṭilābho, dullabhā khaṇa sampatti, dullabhā pabbajjā,

dullabhaṃ saddhamma savanaṃ,

dullabho sappurisa saṃsevo,

ārabhatha nikkhamatha yuñjatha buddha sāsane, dhunātha maccuno senaṃ naḷāgāraṃva kuñjaro.

Yo imasmiṃ dhamma vinaye appamatto vihessati, pahāya jāti saṃsāraṃ dukkhassantaṃ karissati.

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 15. Bhāvanā
content: (Meditation period)

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 16. Paccavekkhanā – Atīta/ Dātu/ Asubha
content:
Cīvara

mayāpaccavekkhitvā ajja yaṃ cīvaraṃ paribhuttaṃ taṃ – ‘Yāvadeva sītassa paṭighātāya

uṇhassa paṭighātāya

ḍaṃsamakasavātātapasiriṃsapasamphassānaṃ paṭighātāya

yāvadeva hirikopīnapaṭicchādanatthaṃ.

Yathāpaccayaṃ pavattamānaṃ dhātumattamevetaṃ yadidaṃ cīvaraṃ

tadupabhuñjako ca puggalo dhātumattako nissatto nijjīvo suñño

sabbāni pana imāni cīvarāni, ajigucchanīyāni

imaṃ pūtikāyaṃ patvā ativiya jigucchanīyāni jāyantī.

Piṇḍapāta

Mayāpaccavekkhitvā ajja yo piṇḍapāto paribhutto

so – ‘Neva davāya na madāya na maṇḍanāya na vibhūsanāya

yāvadeva imassa kāyassa ṭhitiyā yāpanāya

vihiṃsūparatiyā brahmacariyānuggahāya

iti purāṇañca vedanaṃ paṭihaṅkhāmi, navañca vedanaṃ na uppādessāmi

yātrā ca me bhavissati anavajjatā ca phāsuvihāro cāti.

Yathāpaccayaṃ pavattamānaṃ dhātumattamevetaṃ yadidaṃ piṇḍapāto

tadupa bhuñjako ca puggalo dhātumattako nissatto nijjīvo suñño

sabbo panāyaṃ piṇḍapāto ajigucchanīyo

imaṃ pūtikāyaṃ patvā ativiya jigucchanīyo jāyatī.

Senāsana

Mayāpaccavekkhitvā ajjayaṃ senāsanaṃ paribhuttaṃ

taṃ – yāvadeva sītassa paṭighātāya, uṇhassa paṭighātāya

ḍaṃsamakasavātātapasarīsapasamphassānaṃ paṭighātāya

yāvadeva utuparissayavinodaṃ paṭisallānārāmatthaṃ.

Yathāpaccayaṃ pavattamānaṃ dhātumattamevetaṃ yadidaṃ senāsanaṃ

tadupabhuñjako ca puggalo

dhātumattako nissatto nijjīvo suñño

sabbāni pana imāni senāsanāni ajigucchanīyāni

imaṃ pūtikāyaṃ patvā ativiya jigucchanīyāni jāyantī.

Gilānappaccaya

Mayāpaccavekkhitvā ajjayo gilānappaccayabhesajjaparikkhāro paribhutto

so– ‘Yāvadeva uppannānaṃ veyyābādhikānaṃ vedanānaṃ paṭighātāya

abyābajjhaparamatāyā’ti.

Yathāpaccayaṃ pavattamānaṃ dhātumattamevetaṃ yadidaṃ gilānappaccayabhesajjaparikkhāro

tadupabhuñjako ca puggalo

dhātumattako nissatto nijjīvo suñño

sabbo panāyaṃ gilānappaccayabhesajjaparikkhāro ajigucchanīyo

imaṃ pūtikāyaṃ patvā ativiya jigucchanīyo jāyatī.

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 17. Anumodanā gāthā (Sharing Merits)
content:
To Past relatives
idaṃ vo ñātīnaṃ hotu sukhitā hontu ñātayo!!! (Three times)

To Celestial and all Beings
ākāsaṭṭhā ca bhummaṭṭhā devā nāgā mahiddhikā puññaṃ taṃ anumoditvā ciraṃ rakkhantu sambuddha sāsanaṃ!

ākāsaṭṭhā ca bhummaṭṭhā devā nāgā mahiddhikā

puññaṃ taṃ anumoditvā ciraṃ rakkhantu sambuddha desanaṃ!

ākāsaṭṭhā ca bhummaṭṭhā devā nāgā mahiddhikā puññaṃ taṃ anumoditvā ciraṃ rakkhantu sambuddha sāvakaṃ!

kappasatasahassāni soḷasāpi asaṅkhiye, sambharaṃ bodhisambhāre āgato jāti jātiyo, niyato buddhabhāvāya bhaddakappe idhantime, bodhisatto ca metteyyo puññaṃ me anumodatu!

cattāro ca mahārājā sakko cāti surāpare, anumoditvā imaṃ puññaṃ rakkhantu jina sāsanaṃ!

asmiṃ vihāre ca ārāme adhivatthā ca devatā, anumoditvā imaṃ puññaṃ rakkhantu jina sāsanaṃ! sabbe sattā ca majjhattā hitā ca ahitā ca me, anumoditvā imaṃ puññaṃ bujjhantu amataṃ padaṃ!

To Late Teachers
sīlādinā guṇagaṇena katūbhayatthā therāsabhā mama garū tidivaṃ supattā puññena nena pakatena samiddhacittā santiṃ bhavantu hadayassa sukhena pattā.

To Respected Elders/Teachers
Dhammena nena matisiddha mudācitena, buddhādi vatthu gata dhamma balena saddhiṃ, therāsabho ………. Yatinda nātho,

dīghāyuko bhavatu sādhu samiddha citto! dhammena nena matisiddha mudācitena, buddhādi vatthu gata dhamma balena saddhiṃ, therāsabhātha garugārava bhāvanīyā, dīghāyukā bhavatha sādhu samiddha cittā!

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 18. Patthanā (Wholesome wishes)
content:
iminā puñña kammena mā me bāla samāgamo sataṃ samāgamo hotu yāva nibbāna pattiyā!!! (Three times)

idaṃ me puñña kammaṃ āsavakkhayā vahaṃ hotu!!! (Three times) sabba dukkhā pamuñcatu!

imāya dhammānu dhammapaṭipattiyā buddhaṃ pūjemi!

imāya dhammānu dhammapaṭipattiyā dhammaṃ pūjemi!

imāya dhammānu dhammapaṭipattiyā saṃghaṃ pūjemi!

addhā imāya paṭipattiyā jāti, jarā, vyādhi, maraṇamhā parimuccissāmī’ti!

heading: Monday/ Wednesday
title: 19. Khamāpana gāthā (Asking for forgiveness)
content:
kāyena vācā cittena pamādena mayā kataṃ accayaṃ khama me bhante bhūripañña tathāgata.

Kāyena vācā cittena pamādena mayā kataṃ accayaṃ khama me dhamma sandiṭṭhika akālika.

Kāyena vācā cittena pamādena mayā kataṃ accayaṃ khama me saṃgha puññakkhetta anuttara.

Sādhu! sādhu! sādhu!

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: Preliminary Homage
content: Namo tassa bhagato arahato sammāsambuddhassa!

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 01. Ārādhanā (Invitation)
content:
yāvatā bhagavā loke - tiṭṭheyya tava sāsanaṃ;

tāvatā patigaṇhātu - pūjā lokānukampayā.

yāvatā bhagavā loke - tiṭṭheyya tava sāsanaṃ;

tāvatā patigaṇhātu - pūjā lokānukampayā.

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 02. Padīpa pūjā (Offering Oil Lamp)
content:
gandhatelappadittena - dīpena tama dhaṃsinā;

tileāka dīpaṃ sambuddhaṃ - pūjayāmī tamonudaṃ.

Sitthatelappa dittena - dīpena tama dhaṃsinā;

tileāka dīpaṃ sambuddhaṃ - pūjayāmī tamonudaṃ.

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 03. Gandha pūjā (Offering Fragrance)
content:
sugandhikāya vadanaṃ - ananta guṇagandhinaṃ;

sugandhināhaṃ gandhena - pūjayāmī tathāgataṃ.

title: 04. Gandhodaka pūjā (Offering Drinking water)
content:
sugandhaṃ sītalaṃ kappaṃ - pasanna madhuraṃ subhaṃ;

pānīya metaṃ bhagavā - patigaṇhātu muttama.

title: 05. Uṇhodaka pūjā (Warm Water)
content:
adhivāsetu neā bhante - uṇhodakaṃ parikappitaṃ;

anukampaṃ upādāya - patigaṇhātu muttama.

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 06. Pānaka pūjā (Offering Allowable Drinks)
content:
adhivāsetu no bhante- gilānapaccayaṃ imaṃ;

anukampaṃ upādāya - patigaṇhātu muttama.

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 07. Phuppa pūjā (Offering Flower)
content:
nirodha samāpattito vuṭṭhahitvā viya

nisinnaṃ bhagavantaṃ arahantaṃ sammāsambuddhaṃ

iminā pupphena pūjemi pūjemi pūjemi.

ayaṃ puppha pūjā buddha pacceka buddha

aggasāvaka mahāsāvaka arahantādīnaṃ sabhāvasīlaṃ

ahampi tesaṃ anuvattako homi.

Idaṃ pupphaṃ idāni vaṇṇenapi suvaṇṇaṃ

gandhenapi sugandhaṃ

saṇṭhāṇenapi susaṇṭhānaṃ

khippameva dubbaṇṇaṃ duggandhaṃ dussaṇṭhānaṃ aniccataṃ pāpuṇissati

evameva kho sabbe saṃkhārā aniccā

sabbe saṃkhārā dukkhā

sabbe dhammā anattāti.

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 08. Homage to the Buddha
content:
itipi so bhagavā arahaṃ sammāsambuddho vijjācaraṇasampanno sugato lokavidū anuttaro purisadammasārathi satthā devamanussānaṃ buddho bhagavā ti.

Buddhaṃ jīvita pariyantaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi.

Ye ca buddhā atītā ca - ye ca buddhā anāgatā paccuppannā ca ye buddhā - ahaṃ vandāmi sabbadā.

Natthi me saraṇaṃ aññaṃ - buddho me saraṇaṃ varaṃ etena sacca vajjena - hotu me jayamaṃgalaṃ.

Uttamaṃgena vandehaṃ - pāda paṃsu varuttamaṃ buddhe yo khalito doso - buddho khamatu taṃ mamaṃ.

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 09. Homage to the Dhamma
content:
Svākkhāto bhagavatā dhammo sandiṭṭhiko akāliko ehipassiko opanayiko paccattaṃ veditabbo viññūhī ti.

Dhammaṃ jīvita pariyantaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi. ye ca dhammā atītā ca ye ca dhammā anāgatā

paccuppannā ca ye dhammā - ahaṃ vandāmi sabbadā

natthi me saraṇaṃ aññaṃ - dhammo me saraṇaṃ varaṃ etena sacca vajjena - hotu me jayamaṃgalaṃ

uttamaṃgena vandehaṃ - dhammaṃ ca tividhaṃ varaṃ

dhamme yo khalito doso - dhammo khamatu taṃ mamaṃ.

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 10. Homage to the Saṅgha
content:
Supaṭipanno bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho ujupaṭipanno bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho ñāyapaṭipanno bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho sāmīcipaṭipanno bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho yadidaṃ cattāri purisayugāni aṭṭha purisapuggalā esa bhagavato sāvakasaṅgho āhuneyyo pāhuneyyo dakkhiṇeyyo añjalikaraṇīyo anuttaraṃ puññakkhettaṃ lokassā’ti.

Saṅghaṃ jīvita pariyantaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi. ye ca saṅghā atītā ca ye ca saṅghā anāgatā

paccuppannā ca ye saṅghā - ahaṃ vandāmi sabbadā

natthi me saraṇaṃ aññaṃ - saṅgho me saraṇaṃ varaṃ etena sacca vajjena - hotu me jayamaṃgalaṃ.

Uttamaṃgena vandehaṃ - saṅghaṃ ca tividhottamaṃ saṃghe yo khalito doso - saṅgho khamatu taṃ mamaṃ.

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 11. Aṭṭhārasa āvenika buddhaguṇa:
content:
Atītaṃse buddhassa bhagavato appaṭihataṃ ñāṇaṃ

anāgataṃse buddhassa bhagavato appaṭihataṃ ñāṇaṃ
paccuppannaṃse buddhassa bhagavato appaṭihataṃ ñāṇaṃ
imehi tīhi dhammehi samannāgatassa buddhassa bhagavato

Sabbaṃ kāyakammaṃ ñāṇa pubbaṅgamaṃ ñāṇānuparivattaṃ

sabbaṃ vacīkammaṃ ñāṇa pubbaṅgamaṃ ñāṇānuparivattaṃ

sabbaṃ manokammaṃ ñāṇa pubbaṅgamaṃ ñāṇānuparivattaṃ

imehi chahi dhammehi samannāgatassa buddhassa bhagavato

Natthi chandassa hāni

natthi dhammadesanāya hāni

natthi viriyassa hāni

natthi samādhissa hāni

natthi paññāya hāni

natthi vimuttiyā hāni.

imehi dvādasahi dhammehi samannāgatassa buddhassa bhagavato

Natthi davā, natthi ravā

natthi apphuṭaṃ natthi vegāyitattaṃ

natthi abyāvaṭa mano, natthi appaṭisaṃkhānupekkhā.

imehi aṭṭhārasahi dhammehi samannāgataṃ

sammā sambuddhaṃ bhagavantaṃ sirasā namāmi.

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 12. Catu Saṅvejanīyaṭṭhāna
content:
Māyā suto sugata sākiya sīhanātho – jātakkhaṇe sapadasā vabhisaṅkamitvā;

yasmiṃ udīrayi giraṃ varalumbiṇimhi –

taṃ jāta cetiyamahaṃ sirasā namāmi.

Yasmiṃ nisajja vajirāsana bandhanena – jetvā savāsana kilesa balaṃ munindo;

sambodhi ñāṇamavagamma vihāsi sammā – taṃ bodhi cetiyamahaṃ sirasā namāmi.

Saṅkampayaṃ dasasahassiya loka dhātuṃ - desesi yatra bhagavā vara dhamma cakkaṃ;

barāṇasīpura samīpa vane migānaṃ - taṃ dhamma cetiyamahaṃ sirasā namāmi.

Katvāna loka hitamatta hitañca nātho – āsītikova upavattana kānanamhi;

yasmiṃ nipajja gatavā nirupādhisesaṃ - nibbāna cetiyamahaṃ sirasā namāmi.

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 13. Cetiya-vandanā (Worshipping pagodas, etc.):
content: vandāmi cetiyaṃ sabbaṃ - sabbaṭhānesu patiṭṭhitaṃ sārīrika dhātu mahā bodhiṃ - buddharūpaṃ sakalaṃ sadā.

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 14. Paritta Chanting & Devārādhanā
content:
Invitation to celestial beings for listening Dhamma

  1. Sagge kāme ca rūpe giri sikhara taṭe
    cāntalikkhe vimāne
    dīpe raṭṭhe ca gāme taru vana gahaṇe
    geha vatthumhi khette
    bhummā cāyantu devā jalatala visame
    yakkha gandhabba nāgā
    tiṭṭhantā santikedaṃ munivara vacanaṃ
    sādhavo me suṇantu.

  2. Samantā cakkavāḷesu atrāgacchantu devatā Saddhammaṃ munirājassa suṇantu saggamokkhadaṃ.

Dhammassavanakālo ayaṃ bhadantā.

Dhammassavanakālo ayaṃ bhadantā.

Parittadhammassavanakālo ayaṃ bhadantā.

i. Metta suttaṃ

ii. Vatta pirita (one sutta from two bhānavāra)

iii. Mora paritta – (second half)

apetayaṃ cakkhumā ekarājā…….

iv. Khandha paritta - second half

Virūpakkhehi me mettaṃ mettaṃ erāpatehi me…………

v. Āṭānāṭiya gāthā

vipassissa namatthu - cakkhumantassa sirīmato,

sikhissapi namatthu - sabba bhūtānukampino

vessabhussa namatthu - nahātakassa tapassino, namatthu kakusandhassa - mārasenā pamaddino, koṇāgamanassa namatthu - brāhmaṇassa vusīmato,

kassapassa namatthu - vippamuttassa sabbadhi,

aṃgīrasassa namatthu - sakyaputtassa sirīmato,

namo tesaṃ sattannaṃ - sammāsambuddhānanti.

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 15. Sugatovāda (the Buddha’s Daily Admonishment)
content:
Appamādena bhikkhave sampādetha, dullabho buddhuppādo lokasmiṃ,

dullabho manussatta paṭilābho, dullabhā khaṇa sampatti, dullabhā pabbajjā,

dullabhaṃ saddhamma savanaṃ,

dullabho sappurisa saṃsevo,

ārabhatha nikkhamatha yuñjatha buddha sāsane, dhunātha maccuno senaṃ naḷāgāraṃva kuñjaro.

Yo imasmiṃ dhamma vinaye appamatto vihessati, pahāya jāti saṃsāraṃ dukkhassantaṃ karissati.

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 16. Bhāvanā (Meditation time)
content: (Meditation period)

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 17. Atīta paccavekkhanā
content:
Cīvara
mayāpaccavekkhitvā ajja yaṃ cīvaraṃ paribhuttaṃ taṃ – ‘Yāvadeva sītassa paṭighātāya

uṇhassa paṭighātāya

ḍaṃsamakasavātātapasiriṃsapasamphassānaṃ paṭighātāya

yāvadeva hirikopīnapaṭicchādanatthaṃ.

Yathāpaccayaṃ pavattamānaṃ dhātumattamevetaṃ yadidaṃ cīvaraṃ

tadupabhuñjako ca puggalo dhātumattako nissatto nijjīvo suñño

sabbāni pana imāni cīvarāni, ajigucchanīyāni

imaṃ pūtikāyaṃ patvā ativiya jigucchanīyāni jāyantī.

Piṇḍapāta

Mayāpaccavekkhitvā ajja yo piṇḍapāto paribhutto

so – ‘Neva davāya na madāya na maṇḍanāya na vibhūsanāya

yāvadeva imassa kāyassa ṭhitiyā yāpanāya

vihiṃsūparatiyā brahmacariyānuggahāya

iti purāṇañca vedanaṃ paṭihaṅkhāmi, navañca vedanaṃ na uppādessāmi

yātrā ca me bhavissati anavajjatā ca phāsuvihāro cāti.

Yathāpaccayaṃ pavattamānaṃ dhātumattamevetaṃ yadidaṃ piṇḍapāto

tadupa bhuñjako ca puggalo dhātumattako nissatto nijjīvo suñño

sabbo panāyaṃ piṇḍapāto ajigucchanīyo

imaṃ pūtikāyaṃ patvā ativiya jigucchanīyo jāyatī.

Senāsana

Mayāpaccavekkhitvā ajjayaṃ senāsanaṃ paribhuttaṃ

taṃ – yāvadeva sītassa paṭighātāya, uṇhassa paṭighātāya

ḍaṃsamakasavātātapasarīsapasamphassānaṃ paṭighātāya

yāvadeva utuparissayavinodaṃ paṭisallānārāmatthaṃ.

Yathāpaccayaṃ pavattamānaṃ dhātumattamevetaṃ yadidaṃ senāsanaṃ

tadupabhuñjako ca puggalo

dhātumattako nissatto nijjīvo suñño

sabbāni pana imāni senāsanāni ajigucchanīyāni

imaṃ pūtikāyaṃ patvā ativiya jigucchanīyāni jāyantī.

Gilānappaccaya

Mayāpaccavekkhitvā ajjayo gilānappaccayabhesajjaparikkhāro paribhutto

so– ‘Yāvadeva uppannānaṃ veyyābādhikānaṃ vedanānaṃ paṭighātāya

abyābajjhaparamatāyā’ti.

Yathāpaccayaṃ pavattamānaṃ dhātumattamevetaṃ yadidaṃ gilānappaccayabhesajjaparikkhāro

tadupabhuñjako ca puggalo

dhātumattako nissatto nijjīvo suñño

sabbo panāyaṃ gilānappaccayabhesajjaparikkhāro ajigucchanīyo

imaṃ pūtikāyaṃ patvā ativiya jigucchanīyo jāyatī.

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 18. Anumodanā Gāthā (Sharing Merits)
content:
To Past Relatives
idaṃ vo ñātīnaṃ hotu sukhitā hontu ñātayo!!! (three times)

To Celestial Beings
ākāsaṭṭhā ca bhummaṭṭhā - deva nāgā mahiddhikā puññaṃ taṃ anumoditvā - ciraṃ rakkhantu sambuddha sāsanaṃ!

ākāsaṭṭhā ca bhummaṭṭhā - deva nāgā mahiddhikā puññaṃ taṃ anumoditvā - ciraṃ rakkhantu sambuddha desanaṃ! ākāsaṭṭhā ca bhummaṭṭhā - deva nāgā mahiddhikā puññaṃ taṃ anumoditvā - ciraṃ rakkhantu sambuddha sāvakaṃ!

kappasatasahassāni soḷasāpiasaṅkhiye, sambharaṃ bodhisambhāre āgato jāti jātiyo, niyato buddhabhāvāya bhaddakappe idhaṃtime, bodhisatto ca metteyyo puññaṃ me anumodatu!

cattāro ca mahārājā - sakko cāti surāpare, anumoditvā imaṃ puññaṃ - rakkhantu jina sāsanaṃ!

asmiṃ vihāre ca ārāme - adhivatthā ca devatā, anumoditvā imaṃ puññaṃ - rakkhantu jina sāsanaṃ!

sabbe sattā ca majjhattā - hitā ca ahitā ca me, anumoditvā imaṃ puññaṃ - bujjhantu amataṃ padaṃ!

To Late Teachers

Sīlādinā guṇagaṇena katūbhayatthā therāsabhā mama garū tidivaṃ supattā puññena nena pakatena samiddhacittā santiṃ bhavantu hadayassa sukhena pattā.

To Respected Elders/ Teachers

Dhammena nena matisiddha mudācitena,

buddhādi vatthu gata dhamma balena saddhiṃ, therāsabho janānanda yatinda nātho, dīghāyuko bhavatu sādhu samiddha citto!

dhammena nena matisiddha mudācitena, buddhādi vatthu gata dhamma balena saddhiṃ, therāsabhātha garugārava bhāvanīyā, dīghāyukā bhavatha sādhu samiddha cittā!

Patthanā (Wholesome wishes)
iminā puñña kammena mā me bāla samāgamo sataṃ samāgamo hotu yāva nibbāna pattiyā!!! (three times)

idaṃ me puññakammaṃ āsavakkhayāvahaṃ hotu, !!! (three times) sabba dukkhā pamuñjatu!

imāya dhammānu dhammapaṭipattiyā buddhaṃ pūjemi!

imāya dhammānu dhammapaṭipattiyā dhammaṃ pūjemi!

imāya dhammānu dhammapaṭipattiyā saṃghaṃ pūjemi!

addhā imāya paṭipattiyā jāti, jarā, vyādhi, maraṇamhā parimuccissāmī’ti!

heading: Tuesday/ Thursday
title: 19. Khamāpana gāthā (Asking for forgiveness)
content:
kāyena vācā cittena pamādena mayā kataṃ accayaṃ khama me bhante bhūripañña tathāgata.

Kāyena vācā cittena pamādena mayā kataṃ accayaṃ khama me dhamma sandiṭṭhika akālika. Kāyena vācā cittena pamādena mayā kataṃ accayaṃ khama me saṃgha puññakkhetta anuttara.

sādhu! sādhu! sādhu!
